title: GUARDIANSHIP AND CONSERVATORSHIP HELP - 211info
text: THE COMMONS LAW CENTER GUARDIANSHIP AND CONSERVATORSHIP HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with understanding and starting guardianship or conservatorship processes, such as document drafting and filing, legal coaching, negotiation, and courtroom advocacy. Confidential Address Eligibility: Income must be at or below 400% federal poverty level (FPL) Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 850-0811 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 850-0811 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: Sliding-scale fees are based on household size and income DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Conservatorship Assistance Guardianship Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - LEGAL HELP LEGAL SERVICES - TENANT EVICTION DEFENSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE COMMONS LAW CENTER
